description: Style NoteWear these socks with trainers when you're working out. adidas ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Product DetailsThree pairs of socks in one, grey, white and dark navy colours, each above ankle length, with ribbed opening and Adidas tri striped design at opening and Adidas brand logo on ribbed designingMaterial and Care80% cotton, nylon 16% and lycra 4%Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not tumble dry, use softeners or bleachLine dry
